place: Lamai, Tambon Maret, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani 84310, Thailand
note: Fully staffed · private chef & daily breakfast
title: Granite-Boulder Beachfront Villa with Poolside Cinema, Lamai
blurb: A five-bedroom beachfront villa set among the dramatic granite boulders of Koh Samui’s unspoilt Lamai–Hua Thanon shore, with a 19.7-metre infinity pool, a poolside cinema under the stars and sea views from every room. Fully staffed with a private chef. From $1,490 a night.
detail:
One of two iconic homes on a private stretch of the Lamai–Hua Thanon coast, this pavilion-style villa is woven around the giant granite boulders and coconut palms that frame the shoreline, every space opening to sea breezes and uninterrupted ocean views.

The heart of it is outdoors — a 19.7-metre infinity pool with a kid-friendly shallow end, daybeds and sunset views, stepping down toward the sand. As evening falls, a poolside projector turns the terrace into an open-air cinema beneath the stars, and a Thai massage sala waits for slower mornings.

Five en-suite bedrooms are each shaped uniquely around the rock formations, every one with a sea view and its own freestanding bathtub. Open-plan dining and a high-ceilinged living room flow out to the terraces, and kayaks and SUP boards line the beach for the active.

The villa is fully staffed with a manager, private chef, housekeeper and handyman, with daily breakfast included; it can be booked on its own or together with its twin next door as a single estate. Offered from $1,490 a night.

features.l: Booked solo or as a twin-villa estate
